- SD card: [Yes/No, size]

- Serial output available: [Yes/No]

[commit hash or tag]

**What worked:**
- [ ] Display output visible
- [ ] Touch input responsive
- [ ] Keyboard detected on I2C
- [ ] Trackball movement detected
- [ ] LoRa radio initialized
- [ ] SD card mounted
- [ ] GPS fix acquired (Plus only)

**What didn't work:**
Describe any issues, garbage on screen, no output, etc.

Paste boot log here if available

**Photos:**
